title: Aether Compat
description: Adds compat between The Aether and many mods!
body:
**Description:**

This datapack* adds compatability between many mods and The Aether in a variety of ways such as with enchantable music discs, deflectable projectiles and more! Additonally this datapack* works on all versions and loaders of modded minecraft (that have better combat of course)

**Important Notice:**

*Keep in mind this is a datpack and not a resourcepack and can be more complicated to install and play with it is suggested to use a mod such as [Paxi](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/paxi) to make it simple.


**Supported Mods:**

- Savage and Ravage
- Mowzie's Mobs
- Alex's Mobs
- Alexs' Caves
- Dungeon Now Loading 
- Atmospheric
- Environmental
- Berry Good
- Species
- L_ender's_cataclysm
- Rotten Creatures
- Infernal Expansion
- Quark
- Supplementaries
- SullysMod
- Galosphere
- Dungeons Delight
- Neapolitan
- Nirvana
